community_notes.excerpt: Reddit search results include player discussion specifically naming the A.C.I.D. Launcher, including questions about using it to destroy glowing mountains. This corroborates the in-game name but gives limited mechanical detail from search snippets alone.

Steam discussion search has multiple references to A.C.I.D. Launcher as a mission/objective unit: it can be smoked like Terraformer, it does not count as a building, and instant-kill effects such as acid launcher bypass shield/frozen-style protection in cited player reports.
